content:
Table of Contents

  • What is RebelsFunding?
  • RebelsFunding Challenge Overview
  • Step-by-Step Guide: How to Pass RebelsFunding Challenge
  • Quick Comparison: RebelsFunding vs. Alternatives
  • Pros and Cons of RebelsFunding
  • FAQs and Key Considerations
  • TradingToolsHub Recommendation

What is RebelsFunding?

RebelsFunding is a proprietary trading firm designed for cost-conscious forex traders who want to access funded accounts without strict time pressure. According to the official RebelsFunding website, the platform stands out for its industry-lowest entry fees (starting at $25) and a unique no time limit policy on challenge completion. Note: RebelsFunding uses its own proprietary trading platform and does not support MetaTrader 4 or 5. For a full breakdown, see our RebelsFunding review.

RebelsFunding Challenge Overview

The RebelsFunding challenge is the gateway to becoming a funded trader with this firm. Here are the key facts (as of March 2026, per official source):

  • Entry Fee: Starts at $25 (industry-lowest)
  • Time Limit: None — trade at your own pace
  • Platform: Proprietary only (no MT4/MT5)
  • Instrument Selection: Limited compared to major competitors
  • Refund: Up to 200% challenge fee refund upon passing

For more details on the challenge rules or payout structure, please refer to the official RebelsFunding site as TradingToolsHub cannot verify further specifics.

Step-by-Step Guide: How to Pass RebelsFunding Challenge

  1. Register and Select Your Challenge: Sign up on the official RebelsFunding platform. Choose the account size and entry fee that fits your budget (starting at $25).
  2. Familiarize Yourself with the Proprietary Platform: Since RebelsFunding does not support MetaTrader 4 or 5, take time to learn their proprietary trading interface before risking capital.
  3. Understand the Rules: Review all challenge rules directly on the official site. TradingToolsHub cannot verify specifics beyond entry fee, time limit, and refund policy.
  4. Trade at Your Own Pace: Take advantage of the no time limit policy. Focus on consistent, risk-managed trading rather than rushing to meet deadlines.
  5. Monitor Your Progress: Track your performance and ensure you are meeting all challenge requirements as outlined by RebelsFunding.
  6. Pass and Claim Your Refund: Upon passing, you may be eligible for up to a 200% refund of your challenge fee, per the official source.

For a deeper look at user experience and platform features, see our RebelsFunding review.

Quick Comparison: RebelsFunding vs. Alternatives

Prop Firm Rating Entry Fee Time Limit Platform Refund Policy
RebelsFunding 3.9/5 From $25 No time limit Proprietary only Up to 200% refund
Apex Trader Funding Not verified Not verified Not verified Not verified Not verified
AquaFunded Not verified Not verified Not verified Not verified Not verified
Blue Guardian Not verified Not verified Not verified Not verified Not verified

For a side-by-side breakdown, visit our Apex Trader Funding vs. RebelsFunding comparison.

Pros and Cons of RebelsFunding

  • Pros:
    • No time limit — trade at your own pace
    • Industry-lowest entry fees (from $25)
    • Up to 200% challenge fee refund upon passing
  • Cons:
    • No MetaTrader 4 or 5 support (proprietary platform only)
    • Limited instrument selection compared to major competitors

For a full list of pros and cons, see our RebelsFunding review.

FAQs and Key Considerations

  • Is there a time limit to complete the RebelsFunding challenge? No, you can trade at your own pace.
  • What is the minimum entry fee? $25, per the official RebelsFunding site.
  • Which trading platforms are supported? Only RebelsFunding's proprietary platform. MT4 and MT5 are not supported.
  • What instruments can I trade? Instrument selection is limited compared to major competitors. For specifics, consult the official source.
  • Is there a refund if I pass? Yes, up to 200% of your challenge fee may be refunded upon passing (source: official site).

TradingToolsHub Recommendation

If you are a cost-conscious trader who values flexibility and can adapt to a proprietary trading platform, RebelsFunding offers a compelling challenge with no time pressure and the lowest entry fees in the industry (from $25). The up to 200% refund policy is a strong incentive for disciplined traders. However, if you require MetaTrader support or a broader range of instruments, consider alternatives and compare options on our AquaFunded vs. RebelsFunding comparison page. For the most current rules and features, always verify directly on the official RebelsFunding website.
